description: Learn how to roast vegetables and meats to perfection.

steps.instruction: Cut your vegetables or meat into even pieces for uniform cooking.
Toss with olive oil, salt, and your choice of herbs or spices.
Spread evenly on a baking sheet and roast for 20-30 minutes, turning halfway through.
Check for doneness and enjoy your perfectly roasted dish!

safety_tips: Always use oven mitts when handling hot trays.
Ensure meat is cooked to the appropriate internal temperature.
